programme.desc: The host leads conversations exploring current trends in sports, fashion and entertainment; she delves into diverse aspects of popular culture with leading personalities.

programme.title: U-Turn
programme.desc: A journalist investigating traffic offenders on a flyover becomes embroiled in an investigation after being accused of murdering one of the motorcyclists.

programme.title: Pinay Pie
programme.desc: Love decides to enter a beauty pageant, and her friends Karen and Yolly put in all their efforts to make her win the title.

programme.title: Pakisabi na Lang... Mahal ko Siya
programme.desc: Gonzo, a student, falls for Geraldine, his substitute schoolteacher, and tries every trick in the book to impress her and change his own happy-go-lucky ways.

programme.title: Super Noypi
programme.desc: Six childhood friends find out that their parents are the most-powerful superheroes in the world, but they must band together to rescue the adults who have been kidnapped.

programme.title: #WalangForever
programme.desc: Mia, a celebrated scriptwriter, reaches a point in life where she does not believe in lasting love. However, her life turns upside down after her ex-boyfriend comes back to her.

programme.title: Wag Kang Lilingon
programme.desc: A young nurse searches for a killer in the hospital.

programme.title: Okay ka, fairy ko!
programme.desc: Enteng and his family travel to the Cave of Darkness to slay the Guardian Dragon and rescue his daughter Aiza, who is kidnapped by the Evil Queen of Darkness Luka.

programme.title: Pak! Pak! My Dr. Kwak!
programme.desc: A doctor (Bea Alonzo) tries to learn the secret of a faith healer (Vic Sotto) while an exiled angel (Zaijian Jaranilla) tries to help the faith healer become a better man.

programme.title: Bantay-bahay
programme.desc: Caleb, a vlogger, agrees to house-sit at his girlfriend’s grandmother’s remote home. He eventually discovers the isolated residence hides a dark and well-guarded secret history.

programme.title: Ekstra
programme.desc: To raise money for her daughter's college tuition, a plucky divorcee (Vilma Santos) tries out for various acting jobs and lands a part on a Filipino soap opera.

programme.title: The Girl in the Orange Dress
programme.desc: After a night she hardly remembers, a young woman wakes up in the bed of a big movie star and an experience beyond her imaginations.

programme.title: Pak! Pak! My Dr. Kwak!
programme.desc: A doctor (Bea Alonzo) tries to learn the secret of a faith healer (Vic Sotto) while an exiled angel (Zaijian Jaranilla) tries to help the faith healer become a better man.

programme.title: Gawa Na Ang Bala Para Sa Akin
programme.desc: Nanding decides to hire a hit man for himself when he is diagnosed with a chronic illness. However, he later discovers that it had been a misdiagnosis and that he must stop his killer.

programme.title: Rematado
programme.desc: A disgraced cop tries to make amends with his angry wife by getting her pawned wedding ring back, but after robbers steal the ring from the pawn shop, he is forced to track them down to save his marriage.

programme.title: Dino... Abangan Ang Susunod Na...
programme.desc: Dino, the son of a congressman, gets sent to a mental hospital because of his abnormal behavior and finds a way to change his personhood.

programme.title: Raketeros
programme.desc: Some middle-aged male friends get into a heap of trouble as they try to recover a priceless dress that they lost after a night of partying.

programme.title: Love Me Again
programme.desc: A woman pushes her three daughters to marry men for their money.

programme.title: Mano Po 7: Chinoy
programme.desc: Beneath the disguise of a happy and wealthy Chinoy family lies their struggles and hardships of tackling various issues of the modern generation, which they face together being united as one.

programme.title: Best Friends
programme.desc: Childhood best friends Ferry (Huub Smit) and Robert (Martijn Crins), now office colleagues, face the greatest challenge to their friendship yet when one of them begins to transform into a zombie.

programme.title: Top Chef S16
programme.desc: A very pregnant Gail Simmons asks the chefs to feed her cravings in a special Quickfire delivery. Then it’s time to celebrate two iconic Kentucky mainstays: local cuisine and bourbon. The Chefs head to Makers Mark, the oldest distillery in America to put their spins on a meal full of Kentucky classics including burgoo, Benedictine, mutton, hoe cakes and dumplings. This is a true battle for Kentucky as the chefs navigate their first team challenge – and one chef makes a potentially fatal shopping error. Can they recover or will they be scraping the bottom of the barrel to make it through? Food and travel editor, Nilou Motamed joins the judges this season, and Maker’s Mark’s in-house Chef, Newman Miller, sits on the panel as a guest judge.

programme.desc: It’s holiday time for Top Chef, and Richard Blais and Brooke Williamson help spread the festive cheer by presenting a white elephant Quickfire challenge. Then, the Chefs receive an unexpected gift as Michelin starred super Chef Eric Ripert sits down with them to celebrate an elaborate traditional French Chrismas dinner. However, once the last bite is taken, Padma informs the Chefs that they’re missing the final part of the tradition of Le Revillon de Noel… the presentation of 13 desserts. It’s a midnight pastry free-for-all as the Chefs try to avoid being on the placed on the naughty list.

programme.title: The Long Way Home

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening at the farm – all Farmer Tom's lettuces have been painted pink! Farmer Tom is really upset so Noddy offers to investigate. After talking to PatPat and Smartysaurus he realises that the Ninjas had asked Smartysaurus to make them pink paint so that they could paint the lettuces. They were using them as pom-poms to cheerlead Pink Ninja as she ran the Toyland Marathon Race! The Ninjas are very sorry that they upset Farmer Tom but he tells them that it's alright. They're welcome to his lettuces but next time, they should ask first! The race takes place and Pink Ninja wins! Thanks Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: When some pieces from Big Ears' jigsaw puzzle go missing, Noddy investigates: where are the missing pieces? He soon realises someone must have taken them and draws up a list of suspects. Having discounted the Pirates and then the Naughticorns, Noddy is baffled. But when Pat-Pat and the Pockets invite him to share a piece of toy cake, Noddy suddenly has a breakthrough: maybe it wasn't one toy who took lots of pieces but lots of toys who each took one piece. Cloppycorn, Deltoid, Smartysaurus and Carlton all admit they took one piece. They didn't think they were doing any harm! Big Ears gets all the missing pieces back and everyone is at last able to enjoy his jigsaw puzzle of Toyland. Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: When Tag asks Mom to be the pilot for the upcoming Dogcaththlon race, Mom isn’t sure she is ready. Until Paw reminds her of the day she saved Pawston! Mom tells the story of how she used her blimp to save the city from an eruption at the kibble factory. / Pawston is hosting a Roller Disco Night in the park, but Frank isn't allowed to attend due to last year's poor behavior. Tag convinces Mayor Sniffington to let Frank come to the party if he passes Leo's Road to Kindness.

programme.title: Go Dog Go!
programme.desc: It’s Show and Tell Day for the Race Cadets! Tag decides to talk about how she got the race flag tag on her collar, but realizes she doesn’t know the real story of how she got it. Her family launches into an epic retelling of how Tag got her tag. / Spike is about to launch into space when he calls Tag in a panic to tell her that he left his special blankie behind! He can’t sleep without it! Tag, Grandmaw, and Grandpaw race off to the rocket launch to try and get it back to him.

programme.title: Dinotrux

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free

programme.desc: Eep gets jealous when Thunk is invited to join the hunters/Grug and Gran must work together after getting stuck to each other with sticky tree sap

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Grug has Thunk use "scare tactics" to get the Valley to defend against the Broods/Eep thinks Snoot is holding Ahhh! Valleyites captive in his cave

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Tim and Boss Baby want to bond with Dad by recreating a perfect "Dudes Weekend' camping trip, culminating in a photo opp, but everything seems to go wrong

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Tim is forced to take piano lessons, he actually enjoys them and Boss Baby realizes that Tim is being brainwashed by his piano teacher, slowly turning Tim into an old man

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When Krupp transfers to another school, George and Harold follow, only to find a bizarro version of Jerome Horwitz Elementary, where the teachers are nice and the kids are well-behaved. But no one's having any fun! George and Harold want to right this wrong with pranks and comics. But Krupp enlists Mr. Neamer (bizarro Meaner), who then super-enlargers his brain and becomes Brainy Blabulous, in order to stop the subversion of authority.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In order to spice up their field trip to Romeinday (an ancient Rome reenactment park), George and Harold trick Melvin into turning the bus into a time machine so they can travel to actual ancient Rome and be gladiators. After offending Caesar with their comic, the emperor is accidentally turned into Cruelius Sneezer and pursues the school group with all his might.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In honor of Dump Day in Piqua- celebrating the creation of the dump - George and Harold try to earn extra credit by creating a trash-alanche. But Melvin creates an invention to suck all the trash into another dimension. The plan backfires when Tubbadump, a trash-covered monster, emerges from that dimension for revenge on the trashmakers.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela. Just when it looks like our guys have the upperhand, Cleve shows them he has one last trick up his sleeve – a mech suit!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded – is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Viggo puts a bounty on Hiccup's head, every Dragon Hunter in the world is after capturing Hiccup, so Toothless and the Riders must rescue him.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Snotlout screws up a mission, he must learn to be a leader and earn the trust of the other riders.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Mala and the Defenders of the Wing find a mysterious stranger who looks suspiciously like Dagur, Hiccup and Heather go to investigate.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Strickler tempts Jim to use dark magic in his training, it hits the school faculty in an unexpected way!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim and his friends decide to take a night off for a double date, only to discover an uninvited fifth wheel.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim discovers Claire’s sickness is much different than an average cold, they must traverse into the dangerous Shadow Realm to save her life.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With Morando and his Armada heading for Earth, Aja and Krel clash with Vex and Zadra over how to handle the situation. Vex and Zadra want to alert human authorities, while the Royal teens seek out a more creative solution -- video games.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The arrival of Tronos – a bounty hunter with the power to control electricity – sparks an investigation by Area 49-B that threatens to expose the Royals’ alien identities. Meanwhile, Mother watches as the Royals struggle to work together to deal with this new threat.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Colonel Kubritz issues a medical quarantine that locks down the high school, Aja and Krel must avoid capture with help from their friends. Meanwhile Vex, Zadra, and Stuart have a run-in with a familiar face.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Ants didn't work together. The Ants desperately wanted to build themselves a home, but all the animals kept sitting on them, or sneezing them far away or swooping them up into tall trees! On the point of giving up, one brave, young soldier ant rallies the troops… “Pamoja! Together! Together they can do anything!!!”… and he was right. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Flea didn't jump. Flea didn't really move at all. She was very big and very round. All Flea wanted to do was to see the world. The Tinga Tinga animals try to help lift Flea high up, but she is too heavy. Then Tortoise comes up with an idea ‘Movement and activity!' and after many attempts Flea discovers that she can jump. She can jump really high! Then Flea can jump everywhere and see everything.! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat's Special Delivery is a very large, very fragile lighthouse bulb, and everything seems to be conspiring to make him break it! Falling timber, an out of control sofa, Bonnie the dog, high winds...! Pat's journey from the sorting office to Pencaster Bay is a minefield of hazards. Waiting for the bulb is lighthouse keeper Chris Beacon and his pet parrot Micawber, both anxious to get the lighthouse working before sundown, and tracking a storm blowing in. Out at sea are Alf and PC Selby, enjoying a day's fishing, until they drift off-course and need the lighthouse to guide them ashore...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: The Thompson's family pigeon, Cedric, has been reported found in Northern Ireland. Pat must take Dorothy and Bill to help bring him back in the SDS Plane. Meanwhile Alf camps out at the sorting office, pining for his beloved Cedric's return. Once in Ireland, Pat meets the man who found Cedric and Dorothy manages to charm him down from his roof. Unfortunately an inopportune phone call from Alf startles cedric and causes him to take up a roost on a cliff face with a friendly puffin. With Alf causing chaos trying "help" Ben tidy up the Sorting office in Pencaster, Pat exercises his climbing skills to retrieve Cedric but it takes a brave abseil from Dorothy and Sean to finally lure the wayward bird back to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Marsha overhears the others saying she is too bossy. She decides that Silver hatch would be a better place without her. Chaos swiftly ensues, can Marsha be persuaded to stay, they can't cope without her!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris is working on Loada while the others plan a surprise evening for him for being the longest serving member of Silver hatch

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris receives a mysterious parcel… the cars are intrigued to find out what is in it. Strange and silly things start happening at the workshop, could it have anything to do with Big Chris' package?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: PC Pete has been summonsed to get to the bottom of some missing fuel. But where's Nick? And who can solve the case?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: It's Fable Forest Rainbow Day when the big rainbow in Fable Forest sparkles and pops like a giant firework. Everyone is looking forward to it until the colours start fading from the rainbow! Noddy needs to investigate before the rainbow disappears for good! Revs converts into a helicopter so that Noddy and Bumpy can fly over the rainbow to find the pot of rainbow gold. They discover that Cloppycorn has been taking the gold from the pot to give his unicorn horn a special golden glow. He didn't realise that the gold was the source of the rainbow colours. Noddy persuades Cloppycorn to return the gold to the pot and Rainbow Day goes ahead as planned. Everyone enjoys the gorgeous firework display from the rainbow. Good job, Noddy.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: When Noddy sees Deltoid flying in the air he decides to investigate: how can they get Deltoid down? Realising that magic is involved, Noddy goes to see Queen Sparklewings to see if she can help but she tells him her wand has gone missing. Someone must be trying to do magic with her wand! Meanwhile more flying toys appear, first Fuse and then Smartysaurus. Noddy at last realises that Deltoid, Fuse and Smartysaurus were all in the middle of making a wish when the magic happened and that the culprit is Pat-Pat, who was using Queen Sparklewings' wand to try and make all her friends' wishes come true. Reunited with her wand, Queen Sparklewings is able to bring down the toys. Another successful case for Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Naughticorns have borrowed Noddy's music player to practise a special dance for Pat-Pat's Pumpkin Party. But when Noddy arrives at the party, the other toys are all scared by a strange noise. Noddy decides to investigate: what's making the scary noise? Using his investigating skills and following all the clues, Noddy arrives at the Naughticorn Stables where he realises that the scary noise is actually a slowed down tune on the music player. The Naughticorns have played it so much that the battery is running out. The Naughticorns have been taking the music player all around Toyland, desperately trying to fix or hide. Noddy reassures them it's not broken, it just needs new batteries in. The Naughticorns say sorry for scaring everyone and Pat-Pat's Pumpkin Party can at last get under way. Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Something upsets all the animals at the farm at night and no one can get to sleep . Farmer Tom asks Noddy to investigate before night falls so that everyone can go to sleep properly. Using his wwwbook to gather clues and using all his investigation skills Noddy travels all over Toyland to find out what has been disturbing the animals. He works out that the new stickers that PatPat gave to the the animals are made out of glow in the dark paper. That's what's been upsetting them all! They couldn't get to sleep because it was too bright! Farmer Tom, Big Ears and Noddy remove all the stickers and everyone settles down for a good night's sleep. Well done Noddy! Shhh!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus and Axel unveil their new "mechano-dragon." It's impressive at first, but the Riders set out to prove it's no better than a bucket of bolts.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: In need of some rest and relaxation, the Riders head out on vacation. But their supposedly perfect island getaway isn't quite what they hoped for.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: The Community Center's Lost and Found is full and it's up to the gang to use their detective skills and return the lost items to their original owners. / Rodney only needs one more bird on his birdwatching list, but the only problem is that it only comes out at night! Team Zenko must help Rodney face his fear of the dark so he can get the last picture for his collection.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the trees start losing their leaves, Phoebe begins knitting the trees in the park sweaters, but when the neighborhood kids see the sweaters they think they're a mysterious "Yarn Fairy," and they want to see her in action, making it much harder for the Dews to put more sweaters on the latest trees that have lost their leaves. / When Marcus and Harper team-up for a school project, they decide to bake something ("It's like inventing, but with food!"), only to come across multiple baking misshaps (and happy accidents) along the way that the Dew Drops must secretly assist them with.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: It's Fable Forest Rainbow Day when the big rainbow in Fable Forest sparkles and pops like a giant firework. Everyone is looking forward to it until the colours start fading from the rainbow! Noddy needs to investigate before the rainbow disappears for good! Revs converts into a helicopter so that Noddy and Bumpy can fly over the rainbow to find the pot of rainbow gold. They discover that Cloppycorn has been taking the gold from the pot to give his unicorn horn a special golden glow. He didn't realise that the gold was the source of the rainbow colours. Noddy persuades Cloppycorn to return the gold to the pot and Rainbow Day goes ahead as planned. Everyone enjoys the gorgeous firework display from the rainbow. Good job, Noddy.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: When Noddy sees Deltoid flying in the air he decides to investigate: how can they get Deltoid down? Realising that magic is involved, Noddy goes to see Queen Sparklewings to see if she can help but she tells him her wand has gone missing. Someone must be trying to do magic with her wand! Meanwhile more flying toys appear, first Fuse and then Smartysaurus. Noddy at last realises that Deltoid, Fuse and Smartysaurus were all in the middle of making a wish when the magic happened and that the culprit is Pat-Pat, who was using Queen Sparklewings' wand to try and make all her friends' wishes come true. Reunited with her wand, Queen Sparklewings is able to bring down the toys. Another successful case for Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Naughticorns have borrowed Noddy's music player to practise a special dance for Pat-Pat's Pumpkin Party. But when Noddy arrives at the party, the other toys are all scared by a strange noise. Noddy decides to investigate: what's making the scary noise? Using his investigating skills and following all the clues, Noddy arrives at the Naughticorn Stables where he realises that the scary noise is actually a slowed down tune on the music player. The Naughticorns have played it so much that the battery is running out. The Naughticorns have been taking the music player all around Toyland, desperately trying to fix or hide. Noddy reassures them it's not broken, it just needs new batteries in. The Naughticorns say sorry for scaring everyone and Pat-Pat's Pumpkin Party can at last get under way. Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Exists
programme.desc: A group of friends who ventures into the remote Texas woods for a party weekend finds themselves stalked by Bigfoot

programme.title: Royal Tramp 2
programme.desc: After being exposed, Lung-er is bent on eliminating the person who disclosed her true identity - Wai Siu-bo but complications ensue when Lung-er is assigned to protect Ng Ying-hung who is betrothed to Princess Kin-ning and Wai Siu-bo is assigned to be her escort by the Emperor.

programme.title: There Are No Saints
programme.desc: A man nicknamed "the Jesuit," is imprisoned for a crime he didn't commit. When his wife is murdered and his son kidnapped and taken to Mexico, he devises an elaborate and dangerous plan to rescue his son and avenge the murder.

programme.title: The Row
programme.desc: A college freshman discovers a dark secret about the sorority house she's pledging for after a series of murders terrorize the campus.

programme.title: Death Forest and Death Forest 2
programme.desc: The students of a school go on a trip not knowing what's in there can I survive The mysterious ghost of the forest and just like that it's a bloody massacre.

programme.title: Wind River
programme.desc: A veteran hunter helps an FBI agent investigate the murder of a young woman on a Wyoming Native American reservation.

programme.title: The Road Within
programme.desc: A young man with Tourette's Syndrome embarks on a road trip with his recently-deceased mother's ashes.

programme.title: New Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A fighter helps a woman protect her martial-arts school in World War II Taiwan.

programme.title: Beautiful Disaster
programme.desc: College freshman Abby tries to distance herself from her dark past while resisting her attraction to bad boy Travis.

programme.title: Accident
programme.desc: A group of teenagers suffer a terrible accident during a joy ride and get trapped at the bottom of a ravine

programme.title: Contorted
programme.desc: After tragedy, a family moves to a new house outside of the city, only to find the house was cheap due to unorthodox reasons.

programme.title: Septembers of Shiraz
programme.desc: Prior to the Iranian revolution it was a place where people of all religions were allowed to flourish. This is the story of a prosperous Jewish family who abandon everything before they are consumed by the passions of revolutionaries.

programme.title: The Box
programme.desc: A music producer fallen from grace finds an artist who has everything needed to make it big and discovers the one thing holding him back, paralyzing stage fright.

programme.title: Port Control: Spain (S1)
programme.desc: A look at the daily challenges of the hard-working men and women in charge of the operations at some of the busiest harbors in Spain.

programme.title: Port Control: Spain (S1)
programme.desc: A look at the daily challenges of the hard-working men and women in charge of the operations at some of the busiest harbors in Spain.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S8)
programme.desc: Despite the worst conditions in a decade, the miners hedge their bets as Shawn and Ken go head to head with their largest ships ever.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Building Icons: The Global One
programme.desc: How is this new Metropolitan city - Nangang district making technological advancements that will soon put it on par with the most advanced cities in the world.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: Matt tackles a hoard packed with vintage toys and hidden guns. Matt test-drives a '60s sports car and test-fires weapons. Total sales top $100,000.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water (S8)
programme.desc: On a resupply mission, Wes goes missing after a life-threatening fall from the airboat into the raging 36°F river, and the crew fears the worst.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Parker looks for the weakest link in the crew. Tony approaches Parker to make a deal and raids his son's operation. Rick fires up on Lightning Creek.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S9)
programme.desc: The crews and their battered boats are feeling the brunt of one of the hardest Opilio seasons on record.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S9)
programme.desc: Midway through the winter crab season and the Bering sea is taking its toll on the boats and the men.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S9)
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the Opilio season, the fleet prepares to make the final push to wrap up their seasons.

programme.title: Ed Stafford's Rite Of Passage (S1)
programme.desc: Ed endures the bullet-ant ceremony, the most painful thing this side of child birth. Also facing 24 hours of agony are Brazilian boys who do this 20 times to become men.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 73
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 7
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year - Episode 7
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the winners of our heats are joined by a wildcard chosen by our judges. Seven talented artists return for the semi-final, each given 4 hours to capture the likeness and spirit of Dr. Karl Kruszelnicki.

programme.title: Art Works - Sydney Modern, Thea Perkins, The Oscars
programme.desc: Alfredo and Isabel Aquilizan reflect on their work for the AGNSW building; Thea Perkins returns to Arrernte Country ahead of her Carriageworks commission; Lisa Skerrett chats all things Oscars with Kate Jinx and Jamie Tram.

programme.title: Australia In Colour - Family
programme.desc: Soon after Federation, the familly unit is buffeted by world conflicts and poverty but then new attitudes, changing laws and the pill loosen rigid gender roles for good.

programme.title: Alone Australia - Episode 1
programme.desc: Ten survivalists are dropped into the West Coast Ranges of Tasmania for the challenge of a lifetime: to survive in the wild without any human contact. Only the last one standing can win $250,000.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 73
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice - Dilruk Jayasinha
programme.desc: Alice has some treats in store for funnyman Dilruk Jayasinha.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 7
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 103
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 57
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year - Episode 7
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the winners of our heats are joined by a wildcard chosen by our judges. Seven talented artists return for the semi-final, each given 4 hours to capture the likeness and spirit of Dr. Karl Kruszelnicki.

programme.title: The World - Episode 57
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 7
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 11
programme.desc: Trump's presidency steamrolls into its second year and a deeply divided America celebrates its 250th birthday. US voters will go to the polls for the midterm elections - will Republicans hold on to their majority in Congress?

programme.title: The Pacific - Episode 4
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country - New South Wales
programme.desc: Halina starts out in Bowraville, near Coffs Harbour where she discovers a mobile plastic recycling station which transforms plastic waste into multiple resources, creating opportunity for the local Aboriginal Corporation.

programme.title: ABC Late News - Episode 73
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

programme.title: The Business - Episode 41
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 57
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World - Episode 57
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year - Episode 7
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the winners of our heats are joined by a wildcard chosen by our judges. Seven talented artists return for the semi-final, each given 4 hours to capture the likeness and spirit of Dr. Karl Kruszelnicki.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 7
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 11
programme.desc: Trump's presidency steamrolls into its second year and a deeply divided America celebrates its 250th birthday. US voters will go to the polls for the midterm elections - will Republicans hold on to their majority in Congress?

programme.title: Roads Unknown India - Episode 3
programme.desc: Jess sets off for Palakkad, exporing the region's lush tea plantations and local tribal villages. As the crew heads into Karnataka, they visit a stunning waterfall and gain more riders along the way.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country - New South Wales
programme.desc: Halina starts out in Bowraville, near Coffs Harbour where she discovers a mobile plastic recycling station which transforms plastic waste into multiple resources, creating opportunity for the local Aboriginal Corporation.

programme.title: The World - Episode 57
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 74
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 74
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 74
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 74
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Meet Joe Black
programme.desc: Death, who takes the form of a young man killed in an accident, asks a media mogul to act as his guide to teach him about life on Earth and, in the process, he falls in love with the mogul's daughter.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: A young Navy lawyer risks his career to uncover the truth during a military trial.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Executive Decision
programme.desc: In a chillingly prescient story, 400 terrified passengers face death on a plane hijacked by terrorists. In a daring rescue attempt, an elite military unit boards the plane ... but as they hurtle toward Washington, D.C., the president must decide whether to destroy the plane or allow the heroes time to overpower the terrorists.

programme.title: Float
programme.desc: After she nearly drowns, a young woman unexpectedly falls for the small-town lifeguard who rescued her. Based on the novel by Kate Marchant.

programme.title: Just For Laughs S25 - EP 8
programme.desc: Just For Laughswill tickle everyone's funny bone with its hilarious practical jokes, hidden camera pranks, and other creative hijinks.

programme.title: Films & Stars 2026/27 - EP 1
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 4
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby: S4 - EP 6
programme.desc: Presenters Giles Coren and Monica Galetti visit locations that represent the ultimate in luxury. In this series, they stay at a design hotel tucked away in a remote part of Iceland, experience the magic of the desert at a secluded Abu Dhabi resort, and venture beyond the lobby at London's most expensive - and exclusive - hotel, and more.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall - EP 3
programme.desc: Whale with Steve Backshall gives a stunning and comprehensive overview of the world of whales, dolphins and porpoises. Adventurer and conservationist Steve Backshall travels from the Azores to the Arctic, capturing breathtaking underwater footage in each unique habitat.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.desc: The stakes are higher than ever for Ash, Goh, and Chloe as they advance toward their goals! As the Pokmon World Coronation Series tournament heats up, intensive training is in store for Ash, Pikachu, and their Pokmon friends.

programme.title: On The Red Dot - EP 34
programme.desc: Fighting Cancer follows three young Singaporeans with stage 4 cancer as they battle survival while juggling treatment, family, and work, revealing their resilience in the face of uncertainty.

programme.title: Talking Point - EP 37
programme.desc: We use our bath towel daily but how often are we washing it? Steven Chia sends our viewers' bath towels to a lab to find out what could be growing in them, if they're not washed often enough.

programme.title: Kin - EP 325
programme.desc: Debbie finds out that Ella has feelings for Dr Shen. Emily's attempts to bribe Ella to stop being a sugar baby backfires. Rosnani and Louis make their feelings known to one another, however, Louis has something to hide.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons - EP 6
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver is back with an uplifting series that takes us through the whole year – from spring to winter – celebrating gorgeous ingredients and the delicious dishes we can make with them.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef’s Line?

programme.title: The Chase S16 - EP 11
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 93
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Moneyball S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ian Wright presents the game show where the difference between winning life-changing money and going home with nothing rests entirely on the roll of a ball.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 46
programme.desc: Can Aunty Lee and Cherril uncover the truth behind Mark’s mysterious night before his wife finds out? Meanwhile, Salim confronts Naren over his suspicion that his partner is having an affair.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Big Adventures: Into Thailand With Sue Perkins - EP 2
programme.desc: Big Adventures: Into Thailand With Sue Perkins

programme.title: Code of Silence - EP 1
programme.desc: When the police ask Deaf catering worker Alison to lip-read criminals' conversations, she is plunged into a high-stakes new world. Her assessment of the gang’s clandestine meetings quickly becomes key to unlocking the investigation. But as she finds herself increasingly drawn to one of the suspects, Alison’s feelings about the case become complicated.

programme.title: The Good Ship Murder S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: In Palma, a dramatic kidnap and ransom demand shatters the party mood ahead of a lavish wedding. Jack and Kate set out to unravel the mystery before it takes a tragic turn.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 46
programme.desc: Can Aunty Lee and Cherril uncover the truth behind Mark’s mysterious night before his wife finds out? Meanwhile, Salim confronts Naren over his suspicion that his partner is having an affair.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 9 关键证人
programme.desc: Yao Kang confesses to Guo Ying that the mafia is threatening him to betray the police. He reveals he accidentally killed a frontline staff while hunting down a wanted criminal, and pushed the blame onto the criminal in fear that his future may be affected. Little did he know that it was all recorded on a car's dashcam, and the mafia uses it to coerce him for information on the police force.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 10 关键证人
programme.desc: Mary wants Zhi Ming to invite Guo Ying and Yu Xuan home for a meal. Yu Xuan uses this opportunity to ask Zhi Ming about his background and learns that he was a homeless orphan until Mary adopted him. Although Zhi Ming lost his memory, he remembers that he was kidnapped. Yu Xuan is astonished as she recalls a boy she had frequently played with getting kidnapped when she was a child.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 15 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Ting Xuan confesses to Wei Ren. Wei Ren is troubled, and he tells Ji Dan Zai that he is still going through his divorce and does not think that he is ready to begin a new relationship. Ji Dan Zai realises that Wei Ren does not have feelings for Jia Ying, and he gets angry because he feels anguished that Jia Ying would fall for such a man. In contrast, he tries so hard to pursue Jia Ying, but Jia Ying always avoids him instead.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 16 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: At the En Bloc Signing event, there is an air of excitement. Xiao Long and Shu Juan try to agitate the residents and influence their decision. Wei Ren is angry, and he confronts Shu Juan. Yan Xun invites the property owner to sign the document, but all of a sudden a snake appears, causing a wave of panic. Yan Xun finds out that the snake is actually a toy snake, and that Xiao Long had planned this. He becomes angered by this.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 5 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 6 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. programme.title: The 4 Chefs - EP 8 四大名厨
programme.desc: An outdoor reality cooking series featuring four well-loved celebrity chefs in a culinary quest.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 2 前线追踪
programme.desc: As measles cases resurface in Singapore, Frontline examines the causes, risks of infection, and how individuals can protect themselves. Rising rents and costs are straining hawkers and small F&B businesses, worsened by competition from large chains. Social media helps boost visibility, but what are needed to keeping the business thrive? Why is it challenging to preserve the hawker culture?

programme.title: Timeless Memories - EP 3 业落夕阳
programme.desc: Zayden is slapped by Limin for talking back to her. Furious, he leaves home and asks Qian to take him in. When Xuefeng comes knocking, he and Qian open up to each other over drinks. Qian apologises to Xuefeng. Together, they work hard to pacify Limin. A moved Limin finally relents, and the family reconciles. Qian retires and hands the mirror to Haoyu, the successor to a second-hand bookshop.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 9 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Kowloon My City - EP 3 我爱九龙城
programme.desc: More than a decade ago, Jialin left without saying goodbye, leaving Sanyuan and Kowloon City behind. Neighbours and locals lamented that this well-matched couple could not be together, sympathising with Sanyuan and feeling that Jialin had let him down.

programme.title: Focus - EP 2 焦点
programme.desc: The Strait of Hormuz is under strain, and the Red Sea is unsafe. As oil shipments are disrupted, food supply may be next. With Middle East conflict ongoing, tensions remain high. Donald Trump has also suggested Cuba as a potential next target. Meanwhile, Hong Kong’s old businesses are closing. Is it rent pressure, or deeper economic problems?

programme.title: Taste of Life - EP 1058 甘味人生
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai, Chao and his wife have five children. Devoted all his life into developing soy sauce products, Chu-Tsai very much hopes that one of his kids can follow his footsteps and take over his business, but he also respects their own passions and aspirations. Because of their father's invention dream, the Chao brother's lives are about to change.
